name: Possessed Bond
desc: Reveal 1 Level 5 "Possessed" monster from your hand or Deck; add 1 "Charmer" monster or 1 "Familiar-Possessed" monster, and 1 Spellcaster monster with the same Attribute from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Possessed Bond" once per turn. You can banish this card from your GY, then reveal 2 monsters with the same Attribute from your hand; Special Summon 1 of them, then you can shuffle 1 Level 5 or higher monster from your hand into the Deck, and if you do, draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Possessed Bond" once per turn.
strings: Reveal 1 Level 5 Possessed to search 2 cards and discard 1
GY: Banish to Special Summon 1 of 2 revealed hand monsters
Shuffle 1 Level 5 or higher monster from your hand into the Deck to draw 1 card
